examples: You might object that professionals excavate to acquire knowledge, not money.
A contractor was hired to drain the reservoir and to excavate soil from one area for replacement with clay.
'They even excavate pools to ensure their brood doesn't dry out.'
The state has no plans to excavate the Cambridge site, making research like Butz's important.
East African elephants routinely excavate caves to reach iodine-rich salt deposits buried in hillsides.
